title: POPRUN A5 Academic Diary 2025-2026 Week to View (22x16.5 cm) Soft Cover Spiral 17 Months (Aug'25 - Dec'26) Mid Year Diary 25/26 Vertical Weekly Planner (Mint Green)
features: [VERTICAL LAYOUT FOR 30-MINUTES] The vertical layout for two page a week (from 7:00 to 20:00) detail your daily tasks. Starting at Mid year(from August 2025 to December 2026) is tailored for school schedule.
[MEDIUM SIZELARGE THAN A5]The size slightly larger than A5 is 22 x 16.5 cm which is suitable for bag. Additionally, The unique soft cover allows it to be rolled up and taken away

[EXTRA FUNCTION] Monthly overview with space for notes on the side. 2025 & 2026 Year Overview + Expenses Page + Contact Page + Extra Dotted Notes Page are also included. Extendable pocket on the back for small items.
[UNIQUE QUICK SEARCH] "Today" ruler for quick navigation; Easy-track Corner are designed to mark any date you want.
[80 GSM PAPER] The use of premium 80 GSM acid-free ivory colour paper . Comfortable to the touch and ink resistant.
